title: oeonia volucris
intro: Oeonia volucris, also known as the Butterfly Orchid, is a species of orchid native to tropical regions of Central and South America. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Oeonia volucris include its ability to treat digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems. Herbal preparations of Oeonia volucris can be found in teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are often used to treat various health conditions, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy.
